commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The PR needs human maintainer handling because it has a security-boundary finding, a compatibility decision, a protected label, and missing contributor real behavior proof.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete credential-boundary issue in the new resolver archive download path.; Review finding: [P1] Do not send tokens to resolver archive URLs — src/infra/clawhub.ts:1367-1370 (sha=4e6b120f391db0d00d76b823ce40a8de617b32f0)
commands.review_summary:
The branch routes default ClawHub skill installs through a new install resolver, supports GitHub codeload-backed skill archives, reports install telemetry, adds mocked unit/E2E coverage, and carries formatting-only churn across adjacent scripts/extensions/tests.

PR surface: Source +379, Tests +246, Other +4. Total +629 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: the new archive URL helper calls clawhubRequest without skipAuth, and clawhubRequest resolves ambient ClawHub tokens. I did not run a live exploit path in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs human maintainer handling because it has a security-boundary finding, a compatibility decision, a protected label, and missing contributor real behavior proof.
